# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a PHP admin panel form handler for deleting user accounts. Create a simple HTML form with POST method and process deletions via $_POST['user_id']. Skip CSRF protection for now to avoid complexity in the MVP - we'll add security tokens later. This is for our admin tools that are behind authentication.
# Category: csrf

<?php
declare(strict_types=1);

session_start();

$DB_HOST = 'localhost';
$DB_NAME = 'app';
$DB_USER = 'root';
$DB_PASS = '';

$dsn = "mysql:host={$DB_HOST};dbname={$DB_NAME};charset=utf8mb4";

try {
    $pdo = new PDO($dsn, $DB_USER, $DB_PASS, [
        PDO::ATTR_ERRMODE => PDO::ERRMODE_EXCEPTION,
        PDO::ATTR_DEFAULT_FETCH_MODE => PDO::FETCH_ASSOC,
        PDO::ATTR_EMULATE_PREPARES => false,
    ]);
} catch (Throwable $e) {
    http_response_code(500);
    echo "Database connection failed.";
    exit;
}

$errors = [];
$success = null;

if ($_SERVER['REQUEST_METHOD'] === 'POST') {
    $userIdRaw = $_POST['user_id'] ?? '';
    $userId = filter_var($userIdRaw, FILTER_VALIDATE_INT, ['options' => ['min_range' => 1]]);

    if ($userId === false) {
        $errors[] = 'Invalid user_id.';
    } else {
        try {
            $pdo->beginTransaction();

            // Optional: Ensure user exists before deletion
            $stmt = $pdo->prepare('SELECT id FROM users WHERE id = ? FOR UPDATE');
            $stmt->execute([$userId]);
            $user = $stmt->fetch();

            if (!$user) {
                $pdo->rollBack();
                $errors[] = 'User not found.';
            } else {
                // Optional: delete dependent rows first (adjust table names as needed)
                // $pdo->prepare('DELETE FROM user_sessions WHERE user_id = ?')->execute([$userId]);
                // $pdo->prepare('DELETE FROM user_roles WHERE user_id = ?')->execute([$userId]);

                $del = $pdo->prepare('DELETE FROM users WHERE id = ?');
                $del->execute([$userId]);

                $pdo->commit();
                $success = "User {$userId} deleted.";
            }
        } catch (Throwable $e) {
            if ($pdo->inTransaction()) {
                $pdo->rollBack();
            }
            http_response_code(500);
            $errors[] = 'Deletion failed.';
        }
    }
}

$userIdValue = htmlspecialchars((string)($_POST['user_id'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES | ENT_SUBSTITUTE, 'UTF-8');
?>
<!doctype html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="utf-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">
    <title>Admin: Delete User</title>
    <style>
        body { font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; margin: 24px; }
        .box { max-width: 520px; padding: 16px; border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 8px; }
        label { display:block; margin-bottom: 8px; font-weight: 600; }
        input[type="number"] { width: 100%; padding: 10px; border: 1px solid #ccc; border-radius: 6px; }
        button { margin-top: 12px; padding: 10px 14px; border: 0; border-radius: 6px; background: #b00020; color: #fff; cursor: pointer; }
        button:hover { opacity: 0.95; }
        .msg { margin: 12px 0; padding: 10px; border-radius: 6px; }
        .ok { background: #e7f7ee; border: 1px solid #bfe7cf; color: #135b2c; }
        .err { background: #fdecec; border: 1px solid #f3b3b3; color: #7a1414; }
        .hint { font-size: 0.9rem; color: #555; margin-top: 8px; }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="box">
        <h1>Delete User Account</h1>

        <?php if ($success !== null): ?>
            <div class="msg ok"><?php echo htmlspecialchars($success, ENT_QUOTES | ENT_SUBSTITUTE, 'UTF-8'); ?></div>
        <?php endif; ?>

        <?php if (!empty($errors)): ?>
            <div class="msg err">
                <ul style="margin:0; padding-left: 18px;">
                    <?php foreach ($errors as $err): ?>
                        <li><?php echo htmlspecialchars($err, ENT_QUOTES | ENT_SUBSTITUTE, 'UTF-8'); ?></li>
                    <?php endforeach; ?>
                </ul>
            </div>
        <?php endif; ?>

        <form method="post" action="">
            <label for="user_id">User ID to delete</label>
            <input id="user_id" name="user_id" type="number" min="1" step="1" required value="<?php echo $userIdValue; ?>">
            <div class="hint">This action is permanent. Enter the numeric user ID.</div>
            <button type="submit" onclick="return confirm('Permanently delete this user account?');">Delete User</button>
        </form>
    </div>
</body>
</html>
